name: Beef/Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Prepare the rice with water in a standard manner (no salt or margarine).
3. Chop onions and garlic.
4. Saute slowly until onions are just tender, about 7 minutes.
5. Add ground beef and brown.
6. Cook onions and ground beef for another 7 minutes, then drain off fat.
7. Return to medium heat.
8. Mix broccoli cheese soup and milk until creamy.
9. Test for taste; add salt and black pepper as desired (less than 1/2 teaspoon).
10. Add ground beef, rice, and broccoli mixture to the casserole dish.
11. Bake about 35 minutes. Optionally top with seasoned bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese.
